tagline: Honest and Affordable Professional Pool Cleaning and Maintenance

hero.headline:
Your Pool Deserves Family-Level
Care
hero.subheadline: For over 11 years, A&C Pools has kept Frisco-area pools sparkling clean with honest pricing and personal attention. We handle the chemicals, cleaning, and repairs so you can just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From a<br class="hidden md:block">Family You Can Trust
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to major equipment repairs, A&C Pools handles every aspect of pool ownership so you can enjoy your backyard oasis worry-free.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly cleaning and chemical balancing to keep your pool sparkling clean, safe, and swim-ready all year round.

cards.title: Equipment Repairs & Installation
cards.description: Expert repair and installation of heaters, filters, pumps, and automatic pool cleaners to keep your pool running efficiently.

cards.title: Filter Cleans
cards.description: Thorough cleaning and servicing of pool filtration systems to ensure optimal water clarity and circulation performance.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Control Systems
cards.description: Installation and repair of automated pool and spa control systems for convenient, efficient pool management.

cards.title: Tile & Stonework Repair
cards.description: Small tile repair jobs plus Mastik, Deck-O-Seal, and stonework coping seal service to maintain your pool's appearance.

cards.title: Pool Light Installation & Repair
cards.description: Professional installation and repair of pool and spa lighting for safety and ambiance during evening swims.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Sparkling Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Call or fill out our form and we'll visit your home to assess your pool at no cost. Honest pricing, no pressure, no hidden fees.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our experienced team arrives on schedule every visit. Cleaning, chemical balancing, equipment checks, and repairs -- all handled with personal care.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready year-round. If anything is ever off, we come back and make it right at no extra charge.

about.label: Why Frisco Families Trust Us
about.headline: Family-Owned, Family-Run, and Personally Invested in Your Pool
about.description: Founded in 2015 by Christy C. Johnson, A&C Pools has spent over 11 years building relationships with homeowners across the North Dallas area. We are not a franchise or a call center -- when you call us, you talk to the people who actually service your pool. Our BBB A+ rating and loyal customer base speak to the consistency, reliability, and personal care we bring to every single visit.

features.title: Owner-Involved on Every Account
features.description: Unlike large companies, our owners personally oversee your pool care and are always a phone call away.

features.title: No Contracts. Cancel Anytime.
features.description: We earn your trust every visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees, no surprises on your bill.

features.title: Free In-Home Consultations
features.description: Every new customer gets a complimentary on-site pool evaluation so we can give you an honest, accurate quote.

pricing.headline: Honest Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Affordable plans tailored to your pool's needs. No contracts, no hidden fees -- upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we will return to make it right at absolutely no charge. We have built our reputation on doing right by our customers for over 11 years, and we stand behind every single visit.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within 3-5 business days after their free consultation. We will visit your home, assess your pool, and have you set up on a regular schedule quickly.

faqs.question: Do I need to sign a long-term contract?
faqs.answer: Never. A&C Pools operates on a no-contract basis. We believe in earning your business every visit. You can adjust or cancel service at any time with zero fees or penalties.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We proudly serve Frisco, Plano, Prosper, Allen, McKinney, Richardson, Carrollton, and Far North Dallas. If you are nearby but not listed, give us a call -- we may still be able to help.

faqs.question: What does weekly maintenance include?
faqs.answer: Our weekly service covers surface skimming, vacuuming, chemical testing and balancing, filter inspection, pump basket cleaning, and a full equipment check. Your pool stays swim-ready all week long.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. A&C Pools is a licensed pool contractor in the State of Texas and carries full liability insurance. We also hold a BBB A+ rating for your peace of mind.

testimonials.name: David M.
testimonials.text: A&C Pools provides exceptional service and makes a huge difference. They are a 5-star class A pool company with truly personalized service.

testimonials.name: Sarah K.
testimonials.text: As first-time pool owners we were overwhelmed, but A&C Pools was reasonable in pricing and made everything easy. Highly recommend their service.

testimonials.name: Michael R.
testimonials.text: Consistency, reliability, professionalism and personal care describe A&C Pools perfectly. Our pool has never looked better after years with them.
